name: Feature request

## Problem
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected? -->

## Users
<!-- Who are the primary users (personas, roles, or channels)? -->

## Value
<!-- What is the expected business or user value? How do we measure success? -->

## In scope
<!-- What is explicitly in scope for this feature? -->

## Out of scope
<!-- What is explicitly out of scope (for this iteration or altogether)? -->

## Open questions
<!-- Decisions or unknowns that need resolution before or during breakdown -->
